creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #21)

To sum up:

drm-kmod indeed works with GM45, moreover it supports SNA which is faster than UXA.

However, correct loading of linuxkpi_gplv2 depends on firmware and usb (either in kernel or as a module), which were missing in my earlier attempts.
